problem_id: AI-Based Tender Evaluation and Eligibility Analysis for Government Procurement
team_name: Design a system to detect phishing, scams, or suspicious activities in real-time using AI or rule-based approaches.
summary: Design a system to automatically evaluate tenders and bidder eligibility using AI or rule-based approaches, producing explainable evaluation reports.
optimization_claims: Massive Memory: AI has studied over 5 Million examples of scams to learn exactly how hackers think
Double-Check System: Uses two different 'brains'—one for checking websites and one for checking text messages
Instant Results: You get a safety verdict in less than half a second
constraints_addressed: Phishing attacks have increased by 300% annually
Mobile users are thrice as vulnerable to a “smishing” message on their phones due to smaller screens
